title: Kofi's Rainbow Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Baby Kofi discovers colorful surprises hiding behind playful objects in this interactive peek-a-boo adventure. Each page reveals a new vibrant color with gentle sounds and repetitive patterns that delight young readers.

illustration.description: Baby Kofi with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on a soft cream blanket, covering his eyes with chubby hands. He wears a bright yellow onesie and has a huge smile. The background shows a sunny nursery with pastel rainbow stripes on the wall.
illustration.alt: Baby Kofi playing peek-a-boo with his hands over his eyes

illustration.description: A large, glossy red apple emerges from behind a white cloud shape. Kofi's excited face peeks from the corner, eyes wide with delight. His Latina grandmother with silver braids holds the apple, smiling warmly. Soft red tones dominate the background.
illustration.alt: Red apple appearing with Kofi and his grandmother

illustration.description: Kofi sits cross-legged, hands positioned as if about to reveal something. An orange shape is partially hidden behind a fluffy white cloud. His Asian friend Mei sits nearby, giggling. Warm orange hues fill the soft watercolor background.
illustration.alt: Kofi and friend Mei playing peek-a-boo with orange surprise

illustration.description: A cheerful orange goldfish jumps from behind the cloud with water droplets sparkling around it. Kofi claps his hands in joy while Mei points excitedly. The background shows gentle orange waves and bubbles floating upward.
illustration.alt: Orange fish splashing with excited children watching

illustration.description: Kofi covers his eyes again, peeking through his fingers. A bright yellow shape hides behind a puffy cloud. His dad with dark skin and a warm smile kneels beside him. Sunny yellow light bathes the scene.
illustration.alt: Kofi peeking with his father, yellow surprise hidden

illustration.description: A radiant yellow sun bursts from behind the cloud with golden rays extending outward. Kofi and his dad both have their arms raised up toward the sun, faces glowing with happiness. Warm yellow and gold tones create a joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Bright yellow sun shining on Kofi and his father

illustration.description: Kofi sits with his hands covering and uncovering his eyes in the classic peek-a-boo motion. A green shape peeks out from behind a cloud. His mom with beautiful dark skin and braided hair sits close by, anticipating the reveal. Soft green tones wash the background.
illustration.alt: Kofi and his mother waiting for green surprise

illustration.description: An adorable bright green frog leaps out from behind the cloud with its legs extended mid-hop. Kofi giggles and tries to mimic the hopping motion while his mom laughs. Gentle green lily pads and grass create a peaceful pond scene in the background.
illustration.alt: Green frog hopping with Kofi and his mother laughing

illustration.description: Kofi sits surrounded by all the colorful objects - red apple, orange fish, yellow sun, and green frog - arranged in a circle around him. His whole diverse family sits nearby clapping. A soft rainbow arcs overhead in gentle watercolor strokes, completing the joyful scene.
illustration.alt: Kofi surrounded by all the colorful surprises with his family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is the apple that Kofi finds?
questions.explanation: The apple is red! Kofi finds a bright red apple that goes 'crunch, crunch!'

questions.question: What sound does the fish make?
questions.explanation: The orange fish makes a 'splash, splash!' sound when it jumps out from behind the cloud.

questions.question: Who plays peek-a-boo with Kofi?
questions.explanation: Kofi's loving family - his grandmother, friend, dad, and mom - all play peek-a-boo with him!

pages.title: Color Fun
pages.text: The _____ apple says crunch! The _____ sun says shine!

pages.title: Animal Sounds
pages.text: The green frog says _____! The orange fish says _____!
